scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:simulation
scripts.verify:mvp: npm run verify:launch && npm run verify:narrative
scripts.verify:prd: npm run build && npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:narrative
scripts.verify:launch: npm run build && npm run verify:backend
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:simulation"
